title: Session Search + Filter — v3: Fix truncated filter options, debounce clear race, type augmentation
consumer_purpose: Allow users to find sessions on the home page by full-text search on title/projectName, and filter by time range, agent, or model — with discoverable filter options across all sessions
claim_atoms: All filter options (agent/model/time) are discoverable regardless of how many sessions exist beyond the display limit
Clear button cancels pending debounce timer — stale search never reapplies after clear
TypeScript compiles without errors on session.agent and session.model.id via local type augmentation
All prior v2 claim atoms preserved: fuzzy search, 200ms debounce, model.id comparison, i18n labels
revision_notes: v3 addresses 4 stress findings: F1+F4 (BLOCKER+MAJOR) — split records into fullRecords/records, derive filter options from pre-slice pool. F2 (MAJOR) — add debouncedSetSearch.clear() in onClear handler. F3 (MAJOR) — add declare module type augmentation that was missing from executed code. i18n keys already applied in v2 execution.
